Table Friend with columns student_id (int), friend_id (int) — foreign keys: friend_id → Highschooler(ID), student_id → Highschooler(ID)
Table Highschooler with columns ID (int), name (text), grade (int)
Table Likes with columns student_id (int), liked_id (int) — foreign keys: student_id → Highschooler(ID), liked_id → Highschooler(ID)
